subject: rpmsg: qcom_glink_native: fix error return code of qcom_glink_rx_data()
verifier_note: verifier-v1 build step failed because seed-buggy.c is raw kernel source with non-self-contained header deps (infra limitation, not POC quality). Proceeded with POC after manual review of patch + buggy function; POC mirrors control flow (init ret=0, error path takes goto to cleanup label without ret reassignment, returns ret).
